title: OBO Evidence Envelope
description: Sealed per-transaction artefact recording what the agent did, within what scope, and under what governance. Defined in draft-obo-agentic-evidence-envelope-00 §4.

evidence_id.description: Stable, globally unique identifier for this evidence record.

obo_credential_ref.description: The obo_credential_id of the credential under which this transaction occurred.

credential_digest_ref.description: The credential_digest of the credential at time of transaction. Detects post-issuance credential tampering.

principal_id.description: Repeated from credential for standalone verifiability.

agent_id.description: Repeated from credential for standalone verifiability.

intent_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical normalised intent phrase. Binds the evidence to the specific intent that was admitted.

intent_class.description: The governed intent class to which the intent was mapped.

action_class.description: The action class of the executed action. MUST be within the action_classes declared in the credential.

policy_snapshot_ref.description: Reference to the policy snapshot under which the action was evaluated.

governance_framework_ref.description: Repeated from credential. Enables standalone verification without credential lookup.

sealed_at.description: Unix epoch seconds at which this envelope was sealed.

evidence_digest.description: SHA-256 of the canonical JSON serialisation of this envelope (excluding this field). Format: sha256:<hex>.

corridor_ref.description: Identifier of the corridor through which the intent was routed.

corridor_admission_tier.description: The corridor admission tier under which this agent was admitted.

corridor_predicate_digest.description: SHA-256 of the _obo-crq TXT record content at admission time. Binds evidence to the exact predicate under which admission was granted.

target_id.description: Identifier of the target service or agent.

stage3_ref.description: Reference to the Stage 3 completion event (payment transaction ID, signature ref, consent receipt ID).

why_ref.description: Upstream rationale authority reference for regulated lanes.

route_proof_ref.description: Reference to the routing proof from the corridor.

prior_evidence_ref.description: Reference to a prior evidence envelope in a multi-step transaction chain.
